---
name: Feature request / proposal
about: Suggest an option, hook, or behavior change
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## The problem

<!-- A concrete situation where the module didn't do what you needed.
     A real site, a real playlist, a real outcome. Not "it would be nice
     if…" — what got in your way? -->

## What you'd want instead

<!-- The behavior change. A new option, a different default, a new CSS
     hook, an additional event. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- Did you work around it in user-land? Is there an existing option
     that almost does it? -->

## Scope check

<!-- See CONTRIBUTING.md for what fits. New options on the API surface
     and any change that widens the contract are usually discussed
     before any PR. -->
